programmes.show_description: The origin story of renowned American painter Justin Wadlington, known as the Blind Eye Artist, who rose from the streets of Philadelphia with no formal art training.

programmes.show_name: The World In A Painting: Ingres' Diamond
programmes.show_description: New. Documentary featuring Jean-Auguste-Dominique Ingres' 1807 portrait of Madame Duvaucey. A masterful portrait that reveals details about 19th-century French society.

Back For Christmas: A philandering physician with an obsession for orchids cultivates a deadly plot to see off his wife. Siân Phillips and Richard Johnson star. (S3, ep 1)

programmes.show_name: The Strange Case Of Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde
programmes.show_description: A lawyer concerned by Dr Jekyll's behaviour works to find the identity of the dangerous Mr Hyde. The National Theatre of Scotland's retelling of the gothic tale.
